com.mentor.chs.api.query

Interface IXFilterExpression

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXCustomFilterExpression, IXSBOMContextFilterExpression

    public interface IXFilterExpression
    A query(IXQuery) can filter down data it fetches to those that satisfy boolean condition specified by IXFilterExpression.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getCollapsedForm()
      Get the collapsed form of this expression as a string.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Get the name of this expression
      boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity)
      Evaluate filter expression for the given object.

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Get the name of this expression
        Returns:
        a String that represents the name of this expression

      • getCollapsedForm

        java.lang.String getCollapsedForm()
        Get the collapsed form of this expression as a string.

        This method is internally used by Capital

        It is sufficient to return the name using getName()

        Returns:
        expression as a string.

      • isSatisfiedBy

        boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity)
        Evaluate filter expression for the given object. If it satisfies the filter condition then return true, false otherwise

        Example:

        The following example returns true if the wire has a Signal property 
         boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity) {
        if (entity instanceof IXWire) {
                return entity.getProperty("Signal");
     }
        return false;
 }
        Parameters:
        entity - -- the extensibility object being tested.
        Returns:
        true if satisfied by the filter expression, false otherwise
